_readme: Canned output of hedwig.webchat.answer_prompt (student mode), used by the tuition-chat-widget demo page so the dialog works without the backend. Regenerate per the project README after tuition data changes.
welcome:
Hi! I can estimate what a Westminster program would cost you, including scholarships and how far the money you raise can go.

I know these programs: *BI, BLC-G, BLC-H, FT, MAC, MATS, MDiv-G, TH, TSC, oMAR, oMDR, rMAR*.

Try something like _"How much does the MATS cost if I raise $3,000?"_ or _"How long does the oMAR take at 2 courses per term?"_
fallback:
I'm sorry, I couldn't tell which program or cost question that was. I can estimate costs for these programs: *BI, BLC-G, BLC-H, FT, MAC, MATS, MDiv-G, TH, TSC, oMAR, oMDR, rMAR*.

Try naming one, like _"What would the MAC cost me?"_ - and feel free to mention transfer credits, a scholarship, or how much you can raise.

answers.prompt: How much does the MATS cost if I raise $3,000?
answers.reply:
Hi! Here's what the *MATS (Master of Arts in Theological Studies)* would cost you:

```
Master of Arts in Theological Studies
36 credit hours @ $675/hour

Base tuition (36 cr):              $24,300
Application fee:                     +$100
                                ----------
Total:                             $24,400

Your scenario:
  - Matching Scholarship (raise $3,000, WTS matches $3,000): -$6,000
                                ----------
Your total:                        $18,400

Other options apart from the Matching Scholarship:
  - Advancing Women's Ministry Scholarship: $18,325 (saves $6,075)
```

Good news: no lab fees or hidden charges. You'll buy your own books (used, digital, or public-domain options all work fine).

If you have questions about any of this or want to talk through your options, reach out to your admissions counselor. They're here to help.

answers.prompt: What would the MAC cost me with 6 transfer credits?
answers.reply:
Hi! Here's what the *MAC (Master of Arts in Counseling)* would cost you:

```
Master of Arts in Counseling
61 credit hours @ $675/hour

Base tuition (61 cr):              $41,175
Less 6 transfer credits:           -$4,050
Application fee:                     +$100
                                ----------
Total:                             $37,225

Scholarships you may qualify for (pick one):
  - Matching Scholarship: $27,943 (saves $9,282)
  - International Scholarship: $18,663 (saves $18,562)
  - SBC Course Recognition: $30,725 (saves $6,500)
```

Good news: no lab fees or hidden charges. You'll buy your own books (used, digital, or public-domain options all work fine).

If you have questions about any of this or want to talk through your options, reach out to your admissions counselor. They're here to help.

answers.prompt: How long does the oMAR take at 2 courses per term?
answers.reply:
Hi! Here's what the *oMAR (Master of Arts in Religion (online))* would cost you:

```
Master of Arts in Religion (online)
74 credit hours @ $675/hour
Plan: 2 courses/term -> 13 terms, ~4.3 years

Base tuition (74 cr):              $49,950
Application fee:                     +$100
                                ----------
Total:                             $50,050

Scholarships you may qualify for (pick one):
  - Matching Scholarship: up to $675/term (total depends on term count)
  - International Match: $25,075 (saves $24,975)
```

Good news: no lab fees or hidden charges. You'll buy your own books (used, digital, or public-domain options all work fine).

If you have questions about any of this or want to talk through your options, reach out to your admissions counselor. They're here to help.
